name: Tamron SP 24-70mm f/2.8 Di VC USD G2
description: Characterized by apt focusing speed and image stabilization, the Nikon F-mount SP 24-70mm f/2.8 Di VC USD G2 from Tamron is a revised fast standard zoom covering a versatile wide-angle to portrait-length range.

features.Key Features:: F-Mount Lens/FX Format | Aperture Range: f/2.8 to f/22 | Two XR Elements, Three LD Elements | Four Aspherical Elements | eBAND, BBAR, and Fluorine Coatings | Ultrasonic Silent Drive Autofocus Motor | VC Image Stabilization | Moisture-Resistant Construction | Rounded 9-Blade Diaphragm | Compatible with TAP-in Console
